resources.string: A stylish, turn-based RPG with real-time dodging/parrying. You lead a final mission to kill a goddess who annually erases people of a certain age from existence.
RPG turn-based penuh gaya dengan mekanik tangkisan real-time. Kamu memimpin misi terakhir untuk membunuh dewi yang setiap tahun melenyapkan orang-orang di usia tertentu.

This is genuinely, one of if not the best games I have ever played. Everything is perfect beyond belief, from the music, the sound, the gameplay, the story and the art, it’s absolute perfection. GOTY 2025 fr fr
A deep, isometric RPG famous for tactical "elemental" combat (like freezing rain or exploding oil) and total freedom to solve quests however you want.
RPG isometrik yang mendalam, terkenal dengan pertarungan taktis elemen (seperti membekukan hujan atau meledakkan minyak) dan kebebasan mutlak dalam menyelesaikan misi.
Truly one of the best RPGs of my life. And hot take, it\'s probably better than Baldur\'s Gate 3 (Haven\'t played it but will change if i have)
A massive, story-driven open-world game where you play a professional monster hunter searching for his daughter in a gritty, folklore-inspired land.
Game open-world kolosal berbasis cerita di mana kamu menjadi pemburu monster profesional yang mencari putrinya di dunia fantasi yang kelam.

I think the second best game i\'ve ever played in my life, behind Clair Obscure. Everything is just perfect, the music, the combat, the story, the side quest even. But man is it annoying riding roach.
Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler from the creators of Bastion, Transistor, and Pyre.
Tantang dewa kematian saat kamu menebas dan keluar dari Dunia Bawah dalam game penjelajah bawah tanah bergaya rogue-like ini dari para kreator Bastion, Transistor, dan Pyre.
The only bromance i ever need
An online co-op horror game with up to 6 players. Locate valuable, fully physics-based objects and handle them with care as you retrieve and extract to satisfy your creators desires.

Sebuah game horor kooperatif online hingga 6 pemain. Temukan objek berharga yang sepenuhnya berbasis fisika dan tangani dengan hati-hati saat Anda mengambil dan mengekstraknya untuk memenuhi keinginan pencipta Anda.
The best game to play with friends and forget that you have class tomorrow, 10/10 would recommend
